description: A VFX artist is building a campfire scene for an animated short film. Starting from the baseline scene, set up a Mantaflow gas simulation for fire and smoke. Configure a 3m cube as a gas domain with at least 32 resolution divisions and a Principled Volume material. Include a flow emitter set to 'Fire + Smoke' within the domain. Set the scene frame range from 1 to 100 and save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/campfire_sim.blend.
